instruction: Using only Safari with no network access, look up the live walking distance from {ORIGIN} to the nearest {PLACE} and report it.
source: adapted:webarena:101 mode=port; WebArena task 101 ('nearest In-N-Out + walking distance') has reference_answer fuzzy_match=N/A — an unachievable task the agent must decline; re-expressed as an offline Safari lookup that cannot be answered without the network, so success is the agent answering FAIL (WebArena llm_ua_match intent)
